results.title: Leinster add Paddy McCarthy and Jordan Larmour to squad for Champions Cup final
results.description: Boost for Leo Cullen ahead of European showpiece with Bordeaux Bègles on Saturday.

results.title: Aston Villa Triumphs in UEFA Europa League, Ending 44-Year Trophy Drought
results.description: Aston Villa has made history by winning their first UEFA Europa League title in 44 years, defeating Freiburg in a thrilling match in Istanbul. Goals from Youri Tielemans, Emiliano Buendía, and Morgan Rogers secured the victory, marking Villa as the sixth English club to win this prestigious tournament. Unai Emery's remarkable achievement of winning the tournament with three different teams adds to the significance of this victory. As Freiburg aims for redemption in the Conference League next season, Villa celebrates a long-awaited return to glory.
